name: Kalani 10x14 Shed Plan - A Barn-Style Storage Shed for Tools, Garden Gear, Workshops & Backyard Organization
open_features: A tall barn-profile roof maximizes vertical space for overhead storage, shelving, and improved interior functionality.
Clear framing, standard materials, and easy-to-follow plans make the Kalani ideal for first-time builders and seasoned DIYers.
Rustic double barn doors provide generous clearance for loading tools, wheelbarrows, lawn equipment, totes, and workshop materials.
Rich horizontal wood siding, crisp white trim, and a curved barn roof create a refined, rustic look that enhances any landscape.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Kalani Barn Shed Plan - a 10x14 classic storage and workspace solution designed for efficiency, rustic charm, and everyday practicality. With its beautiful gambrel barn-style roof, timeless wood siding, and double barn doors, the Kalani blends traditional character with functional design that elevates any backyard or homestead. Whether you're creating a garden supply hub, lawn equipment storage space, hobby workshop, or simply a stylish shed to st...
